## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New persona / org template
- [ ] New deliberation strategy
- [ ] Framework / core change
- [ ] Docs / governance

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check conclave tests` clean
- [ ] Added / updated docs where behavior changes
- [ ] For core changes: added tests exercising the new behavior
- [ ] For personas: followed the "strong persona" pattern in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
